note: Journeys executed live via coordinate driving (Flutter release build exposes no a11y tree, so Maestro element-matching was unavailable; taps were by pixel coordinate). Durations are wall-clock estimates from the driven sessions. Success = journey reached its goal screen with expected content.

flows.name: onboarding-vault-grant-android
steps: first-run 'Allow vault folder access' dialog shown
user granted folder via SAF picker
errors: Granted folder was an empty /storage/emulated/0/Download/TyLog, not the synced vault — app gives no guidance toward the real vault and shows the raw content:// URI afterward.

flows.name: settings-and-sync-macos
errors: Settings row 'Sync' subtitle reads 'Folder access unavailable' even though Sync detail reports 'Permission and safe writes verified' — contradictory status.
